Filter/team chip remove buttons ~13-16px, WCAG 2.5.8 requires 24px
Briefing card headers missing role=button + aria-expanded + keyboard handler
No window.onerror or unhandledrejection handler — silent failures

Pixel canvas help text drawn as pixels, invisible to screen readers
Nav search hint + plan badge touch targets below 24px minimum

8 sidebar category divs missing role=button, tabindex, aria-expanded, keyboard support

82+ data tables missing <caption> for screen readers

Zero scroll indicators on horizontally scrollable tables
